title: 6 Pack Red Table Cloth Party Tablecloths, 137x274cm Rectangle Table Covers, Large Wipe Clean Plastic Tablecloth Party for Picnic, Baby Shower, Halloween Party, Christmas Table Décor
features: 🍕 Ideal Size: 54"x 108" rectangle plastic table cloths are sized to cover most rectangular tables up to 8 feet, whcih meet your party, dinner and home needs. 6 Pack value tablecloth set for you to create a neat and comfortable dining table style.

🍰 Premium: Made of high quality, high density plastic material. Thickened plastic table cloths are waterproof and stain-resistant, effectively keeping the clean of the table. And also these plastic tablecloths are tear-resistant.

🥤 No Cleanup Worries: These plastic tablecloths offer you the convenience of cleaning up food scraps or drink spills from your tabletop by simply rolling them up for easy disposal. Enjoy the party while protecting the table from stains effectively.

☕️ Multiple Applications: Suitable for family dinners, outdoor picnics, birthday parties, holiday parties, dinner parties, weddings, home cleaning, etc. These plastic table cloths can be used in a variety of different situations.
🥘 Multiple Color Available: Choose from a wide range of table cloth colors, from light to dark, to match your using occasion and theme.
description: Perfect Party Supplies The Table cloths are perfect for birthday party,baby shower party,anniversary,bachelor party,bridal shower party,wedding,Thanksgiving,Halloween party,Easter party,Christmas party,New Years,Cocktail Party,Housewarming Party,Graduation and get-togethers or other occasions. 1. Tablecloths are made of high quality PEVA material and beautifully designed, perfect for banquet table decorations, they can also be cut to larger sizes or used as tablecloths. 2. The waterproof design of the table cloth protects your table from dust. It's easy to clean them up after the party, just throw them away or wipe them clean and keep them for next time. 3. Tablecloths will add atmosphere to your party and easy to mix and match with other decorations, making it an ideal gift for any design lover and friends and loved ones. 4. Tablecloths can be placed on any table or grass. When the party is over, just roll them up to tidy up the table and enjoy more time with friends or family, saving you lots of time and effort. 5. Plastic tablecloth are suitable for your dining table, kitchen table, cafe, restaurant, diner, catering, brunch, buffet, outdoor patio table, etc. Specification: Material: PEVA Colour: As the picture Shape: Rectangle Dimensions: 54 x 108 inches / 137 x 274 cm The Package Includes: 6 x Tablecloths Warm Note: 1. Color may be slightly different due to different screen display. 2. Slight differences in size are allowed due to manual measurement.
